---
lang: pt-BR
format:
  pdf:
    pdf-engine: xelatex
    Author: Guilherme Freire
    Disciplina: Introdução a Ciência de Dados
    Professor:  Prof. Dr. Washington Santos da Silva
    documentclass: report
    papersize: a4
    geometry:
      - top = 3cm
      - bottom = 2cm
      - left = 3cm
      - right = 2cm
    fontsize: 12pt
    linestretch: 1.25
    indent: true
    toc: false
    number-sections: false
    fig-dpi: 300
    fig-cap-location: bottom
    tbl-cap-location: top
    link-citations: true
execute:
  echo: true
  warning: false
  message: false
crossref:
  fig-prefix: "Fig."
  tbl-prefix: "Tab."
editor: source

library: tidyverse
---

## 01
R(E) = c(6, 2, -1, -4)
P(X) = c(0.15, 0.45, 0.25, 0.15)
S = 10000

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(dplyr)
set.seed(20153)
retornos_possiveis <- c(0.06, 0.02, -0.01, -0.04)
probabilidades <- c(0.15, 0.45, 0.25, 0.15)

retornos <- sample(
  retornos_possiveis, 
  size = 10000, 
  replace = TRUE, 
  prob = probabilidades)

mean(retornos)
var(retornos)
sd(retornos)
mean(retornos < 0)
```
